# Vivek Lalpura Portfolio

Vivek Lalpura is a civil engineer and construction estimation manager focused on roofing, cladding, earthworks, civil project estimation, and quantity takeoff for Australian construction clients.

Primary website: https://viveklalpura.vercel.app/

Key facts:
- More than 5 years of construction estimation experience.
- 6,000+ roofing plans completed.
- 700+ excavation plans completed.
- Open to Australian sponsorship and skilled migration opportunities.

Core services:
- Roofing estimation and takeoff
- Cladding estimation
- Earthworks estimation
- Civil project estimation
- Digital quantity takeoff

Software expertise:
- AppliCad Roof Wizard
- Virtual Estimator
- Bluebeam Revu
- MudShark
- iScaf
- Revit
- AutoCAD
- SketchUp
- Buildxact
- AroFlo CRM
- Microsoft Office
- OnScreen Takeoff

Contact:
- Email: lalpuravivek@gmail.com
- Phone: +91 7405115231
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/viveklalpura
